text.title: Data-Driven Requirements Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-data-driven-requirements.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

example.note: evidence + confidence missing on requirement; data_sources + hypothesis_link missing.

forbidden.pattern: Requirement evidence cites 'a user complained' instead of an aggregate signal.
All requirements ship with confidence=high regardless of sample size.
